mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.meter_id, a.alert_type, a.alert_time, a.alert_status, a.in_temp, a.out_temp, a.room_temp, a.valve, a.company_id FROM ht_alert a WHERE a.meter_id = #{meterId} AND a.alert_status = '0' ORDER BY a.alert_time DESC
SELECT alert_type AS alertType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ht_alert WHERE company_id = #{companyId} GROUP BY alert_type
